name: Assassin's Creed® Odyssey
developer: Ubisoft Quebec, Ubisoft Montreal, Ubisoft Bucharest, Ubisoft Singapore, Ubisoft Montpellier, Ubisoft Kiev, Ubisoft Shanghai
short_description: In this action-adventure game, set sail for Ancient Greece to alter its fate. Fight in visceral battles on land and sea, shape your destiny from outcast to legend, and uncover secrets of your past.
detailed_description:
Comparative Grid


Ultimate Edition

The Ultimate Edition includes:
- The base game
- Season Pass: 2 expansions, 1 mission, Assassin's Creed III and Liberation Remastered
- Deluxe Pack: 2 gear packs, 1 naval pack, and temporary boosts

In this action-adventure game, set sail for Ancient Greece to alter its fate. Fight in visceral battles on land and sea, shape your destiny from outcast to legend, and uncover secrets of your past.

FIGHT AS A SPARTAN WARRIOR
Forge your own odyssey in a world on the brink of chaos and become a legendary Spartan hero, fighting mythical creatures along the way. Charge into epic clashes between Sparta and Athens, with battles pitting 150v150 soldiers against each other.

TRAVEL TO ANCIENT GREECE
Make your way through wild landscapes, vibrant cities, and iconic historical sites. Sail across shimmering seas, climb towering mountains, and discover the heart of a civilization.

CHOOSE YOUR PATH
Your choices shape the world around you. Play in a living world that constantly reacts to your every decision: forge alliances, spark conflicts, and determine the fate of characters. Customize your gear, ship, and special abilities to become a legend.


Gold Edition

The Gold Edition includes the base game and the Season Pass:

- Legacy of the First Blade expansion

- The Fate of Atlantis expansion

- Secrets of Greece bonus mission

- Assassin's Creed III Remastered

- Assassin's Creed Liberation Remastered


Deluxe Edition

The Deluxe Edition includes the base game and the Deluxe Pack:

- Kronos Pack: 5 epic pieces of armor, 1 epic weapon, 1 epic mount

- Herald of Dusk Pack: 5 rare pieces of armor, 1 rare weapon

- Capricornus Naval Pack: 1 ship design, 1 crew theme

- Temporary XP Boost

- Temporary Drachmas Boost

In this action-adventure game, set sail for Ancient Greece to alter its fate. Fight in visceral battles on land and sea, shape your destiny from outcast to legend, and uncover secrets of your past.
